title: kobresia royleana
intro: Kobresia royleana, also known as Royle's Kobresia, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Kobresia royleana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Kobresia royleana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat these health conditions.
